title: Aegis Violation v1
description: Normalized divergence or policy violation recorded in an Aegis execution receipt.

rule_id.description: Stable identifier for the rule that produced this violation.

severity.description: Enforcement severity associated with the rule outcome.

reason.description: Short human-readable explanation of why the rule fired.

event_digest.description: Digest of the triggering normalized event or sequence summary.

metadata.description: Small structured annotations for operator inspection.
